        <section style="background:var(--petrol);padding:5rem 0;">
            <div class="wrap">

                <h2 class="section-title" style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:1rem;color:white;" data-lang-key="corp-h2">Investujete do rozvoje svých lidí?</h2>
                <p style="text-align:center;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.75);max-width:580px;margin:0 auto 3rem;line-height:1.8;">Spolupracuji s firmami, které chtějí dát konkrétním lidem skutečnou podporu – ne jen kurz. Pracuji s certifikovanými metodami <em>PRISM</em> Brain Mapping a Gallup CliftonStrengths, individuálně, s měřitelným dopadem.</p>
                <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:1.5rem;max-width:900px;margin:0 auto 3rem;">
                    <div style="padding:2rem;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:10px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);">
                        <div style="font-weight:500;font-size:1rem;color:white;margin-bottom:0.7rem;letter-spacing:0.01em;">Nový manažer</div>
                        <p style="font-size:0.87rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);line-height:1.75;margin:0;">Přechod do leadership role je náročný. Pomocí <em>PRISM</em> profilu a koučinku pomůžu manažerovi pochopit vlastní styl vedení – a najít způsob, jak přirozeně vést tým.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div style="padding:2rem;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:10px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);">
                        <div style="font-weight:500;font-size:1rem;color:white;margin-bottom:0.7rem;letter-spacing:0.01em;">L&amp;D budget s dopadem</div>
                        <p style="font-size:0.87rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);line-height:1.75;margin:0;">Máte budget na rozvoj klíčového člověka? Nabídnu kombinaci talentového profilu (Gallup nebo <em>PRISM</em>) a koučinku – jako benefit s reálným výsledkem, ne jen odškrtnutý kurz.</p>
                    </div>
                    <div style="padding:2rem;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:10px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);">
                        <div style="font-weight:500;font-size:1rem;color:white;margin-bottom:0.7rem;letter-spacing:0.01em;">Klíčový člověk na rozcestí</div>
                        <p style="font-size:0.87rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);line-height:1.75;margin:0;">Talentovaný zaměstnanec váhá, kam dál? Koučink a talentová diagnostika mohou být tím, co ho udrží – a pomůže mu najít roli, kde bude skutečně prospěšný.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <p style="text-align:center;"><button class="btn btn-white" onclick="showPage(&#39;kontakt&#39;)" data-lang-key="contact-write-h3">Napište mi</button></p>
            </div>
        </section>

        <section style="background:var(--dark-section); padding:6rem 0;">
            <div class="wrap">
                <span class="section-label" style="text-align:center;display:block;color:var(--sage-light);">Reference</span>
                <h2 class="section-title" style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:3rem;color:white;" data-lang-key="ref-h2">Co říkají klienti</h2>
                <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2rem;max-width:960px;margin:0 auto;" class="testimonials-grid-inner">
                    <div style="background:white;border-radius:12px;padding:2.2rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1.2rem;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);">
                        <div style="font-family:Georgia, &#39;Times New Roman&#39;, serif;font-size:2.5rem;color:var(--sage-dark);line-height:1;">"</div>
                        <p style="font-size:0.92rem;color:var(--text-light);line-height:1.75;flex:1;">Working with Katarína was a deeply meaningful and empowering experience for me. She created a safe and supportive environment where I felt free to share even my deepest thoughts and things I had never said out loud before. Working with her feels very natural and unforced, conversations flow easily, without pressure or judgment. Through our sessions, Katarína helped me reconnect with myself and rediscover a part of me that I had forgotten over time. She is like a mirror — helping you truly see who you are and gently guiding you back to your authentic self. She strengthened me, helped me see the bigger picture, and drew my attention to important things that were very close, yet somehow outside my awareness. <strong style="color:var(--text)">I wholeheartedly recommend Katarína to anyone who feels stuck, overwhelmed, or disconnected from themselves and is looking for clarity, confidence, and a safe space for both personal and professional growth.</strong></p>
                        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.9rem;border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:1.2rem;">
                            <div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--sage);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:600;color:white;font-size:0.85rem;flex-shrink:0;">AS</div>
                            <div>
                                <div style="font-weight:600;font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--text)">Aleksandra Stojnic</div>
                                <div style="font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-light)">Expert Learning Experience &amp; New Way of Working, Uniqa</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div style="background:white;border-radius:12px;padding:2.2rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1.2rem;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);">
                        <div style="font-family:Georgia, &#39;Times New Roman&#39;, serif;font-size:2.5rem;color:var(--sage-dark);line-height:1;">"</div>
                        <p style="font-size:0.92rem;color:var(--text-light);line-height:1.75;flex:1;">I had 10 coaching sessions with Katka and they really shifted how I think about myself and my next steps. With her, I felt safe talking about things I normally keep to myself. She's warm and easy to talk to, but at the same time she doesn't let you stay in your comfort zone — in a good way. I felt supported, but also gently challenged to look at things differently and turn insights into action. What I appreciated a lot was that she didn't use a fixed coaching formula. She truly adjusted her style to me, to what I needed in that moment and how I naturally work as a person. Her mentoring was equally valuable, especially in the areas of career development and HR. She helped me bring structure and clarity to complex topics and arrive at concrete decisions I could move forward with. We also went through the Gallup CliftonStrengths assessment together, which helped me better understand what I'm naturally good at and where it makes sense to seek complementarity within my team. <strong style="color:var(--text)">Working with Katka wasn't just "professional development". It strengthened my clarity, self-awareness, and ability to trust my own decisions — something I value greatly.</strong></p>
                        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.9rem;border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:1.2rem;">
                            <div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--sage);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:600;color:white;font-size:0.85rem;flex-shrink:0;">JN</div>
                            <div>
                                <div style="font-weight:600;font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--text)">Jan Neuzil</div>
                                <div style="font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-light)">R&amp;D Manager, Thermo Fisher Scientific</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <p style="text-align:center;margin-top:2rem;font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--text-light)">Ověřené reference na <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/katkahrouzkova/" target="_blank" style="color:var(--sage-light);text-decoration:underline">LinkedIn</a></p>
            </div>
        </section>
